hero.title:
Am I on the Right Path?
A Journey to Truly Know God
hero.subtitle: Assurance of salvation, hearing God's voice, deep prayer, and meditative living—we invite you to a concrete training program rooted in Revine's Bible study content, where every area of life is reinterpreted through God's perspective.

value.title: A Letter from Our Director
value.p1: Welcome to Do Dream International. It is our greatest joy to invite young adults from all over the world to join us in seeking a deeper relationship with our Creator.
value.p2: Our community is built upon one absolute foundation: the Gospel of the Cross. We are here to train together from the very basics of our faith, passionately pursuing a genuine, intimate fellowship with God.
value.p3: As you learn, grow, and follow Him with all your heart, you will also have the wonderful, motivating opportunity to experience the beautiful culture and vibrant life of Korea. We invite you to embark on this unforgettable journey of faith with us.
value.name: Rev. Daniel Yeojubong
value.role: Senior Pastor, Podonamu Church & Director of Do Dream International
bio: Graduated from California Baptist University, USA
Graduated from Southwestern Baptist Theological Seminary, USA
Studied at Princeton Theological Seminary, USA
Honorary Doctorate in Theology from Westminster Graduate School of Theology
Former Lecturer at Korea Baptist Theological University/Seminary
Recipient of the 2nd Korea Christian Award in Missions (2025)
Current Senior Pastor of Podonamu Church
Current President of New Wave Mission
Current Chairman of Youth Mission
Current Director of GOODTV Christian Gospel Broadcasting
Current Chairman of the Korea Christian Academic Society
Current Chairman of the Steering Committee, Korea World Missions Association (KWMA)
Current Director of the Foreign Mission Board, Korea Baptist Convention
Current Central Committee Member of the Korea Evangelical Fellowship
Current Standing Co-president of the Yongin Christian Association
Current Standing Director of Shalom Butterfly
Current Chairman of the Korea Cultural Exchange Foundation (under KWMA)
Current Chairman of Culture & Art Mission Executive Committee, KWMA
Current Chairman of Next Generation Mission Executive Committee, KWMA
Current Representative of Africa Project (NGO)
Current Principal of New Wave Christian School
Current Chairman of the Vision 2030 Military Mission Committee, Korea Baptist Convention

program.title: The Gospel Foundation,<br className="md:hidden" /> Experiencing Grace
program.desc: A comprehensive journey designed for young adults seeking true spiritual awakening through the Gospel of the Cross and intimacy with God.
program.f1_desc: Lay a robust foundation in the Gospel of the Cross. Grow through deep, intimate fellowship with God and dedicated mentorship.
program.f2_desc: As a joyful addition to your spiritual growth, experience the vibrant culture, food, and history of modern Korea with your new community.
program.f3_desc: Build lifelong friendships with young adults from all around the world, sharing together in faith and purpose.

process.title: The Gospel Cycle
process.subtitle: Discover the profound flow of training and sending in our program.
process.s1_desc: Young adults from all over the world, hungry for a God-centered life, gather in Korea.
process.s2_desc: Intensive training in prayer, worship, gospel-centered living, spiritual identity in Christ, servant leadership, and cross-cultural experiences.
process.s3_desc: Sent back as spiritual leaders to serve local churches, impact global communities, and raise the next generation.

stories.title: Stories of Grace
stories.subtitle: Hear the sincere testimonies of intern missionaries who experienced God's grace through this program.

items.quote: What a blessing it is to go out to the nations in my youth and spend each day with God. I invite you to join us on that very field.
items.name: Intern Missionary Gaeul Kim

items.quote: I learned to fellowship with God in love each day, to know Jesus more deeply, and to share that love with those around me.
items.name: Intern Missionary Musun Choi

items.quote: To everyone who wants to recognize God as Father in every area of life and desires a place of training — don't miss this opportunity.
items.name: Intern Missionary Jinhdalrae Kim

items.quote: In the end, when God — not myself — becomes the true owner of my life, the one thing I can do is 'mission.'
items.name: Intern Missionary Yeolmae Ha

items.quote: The greatest thing I learned was that 'ministry is not something I do — it is something God does through me.'
items.name: Intern Missionary Bonggil Yun

items.quote: I experienced God's grace covering me, even in my fear of relationships. I realized that relationships are always an area where I must depend on God anew.
items.name: Intern Missionary Nari Choi

cta.title: Ready to Begin?
cta.subtitle: The journey of faith requires a bold step. Follow these simple steps to apply for the upcoming training program.
cta.s1_desc: Check the upcoming dates and ensure you are available for the full duration.
cta.s2_desc: Gather your passport, recommendation letter from your pastor, and personal testimony.
cta.s3_desc: Fill out our online form and our admissions team will contact you shortly.
